**This file is auto-generated and read-only.** Nothing in Firestore was changed to produce it. Each row is a recommendation; tick the action you want and we'll execute it together.

## Sitewide stats

- Total articles indexed in collections: **99**
- Ghosts (body missing / empty): **0**

## Verdict legend

- **KEEP** — looks healthy; leave alone.
- **REVIEW-CLUSTER** — overlaps with other article(s) on the same topic; decide which one is the canonical.
- **EXPAND** — useful topic but thin; needs more depth before it can rank.
- **MERGE** — same topic as a stronger article; recommend redirecting this URL into the stronger one.
- **RETITLE** — body is fine; the SERP title/description doesn't match what users actually search.
- **KILL** — empty / orphaned / superseded; recommend 301-redirect to nearest live article and drop from sitemap.

Tick boxes in the 'Action' column are left for you. Add an `x` between the brackets to mark your decision.

Each group shares at least 2 meaningful keywords in the title. Decide which URL is canonical; merge or differentiate the others.

---

## Suggested execution order

1. **KILL** rows first — clears noise, prevents Google indexing rot.
2. **REVIEW-CLUSTER** rows next — pick canonicals before writing anything new on the same topic.
3. **MERGE** rows after clusters are decided — easy 301s.
4. **RETITLE** rows — title/meta tweaks only, no body changes; biggest CTR/impressions wins per minute of work.
5. **EXPAND** rows — last, because each one is a content project. Prefer expanding pages that already have inbound links and traffic.
6. Only then start the new 50-pillar plan.
